questionHtml: Transpiration continued after the fifth leaf had been removed. Suggest what can be concluded.
markschemeHtml:
transpiration does not only occur in the leaves
OR
transpiration through stem/shoot ✔

meta.title: Transpiration continued after the fifth leaf had been removed. Suggest what can be concluded.
